
func (s *Server) handlePagePublicGET(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	sess, _, ok := s.auth(w, r)
	if !ok {
		return
	}

	p := testapp.PagePublic{
	App: s.app,
}
	body, err := p.GET(r)
	if err != nil {
		s.httpErrIntern(w, r, nil, "handling PagePublic.GET", err)
		return
	}
	genericHead := s.app.Head(r, sess)

	bodyAttrs := func(w http.ResponseWriter) {
		writeBodyAttrOnVisibilityChange(w)
	}

	if err := s.writeHTML(
		w, r, sess, genericHead, nil, body, bodyAttrs,
	); err != nil {
		s.logErr("rendering PagePublic", err)
		return
	}
}
